highlighted_metric_threshold_panel_count: For the highlighted metric "{metric_label}", how many panels have values above threshold {threshold_value}?
Count the panels where the highlighted spoke "{metric_label}" is greater than {threshold_value}.
Across the radar panels, how many profile vertices for spoke "{metric_label}" exceed threshold {threshold_value}?
Using highlighted metric "{metric_label}", count the panels with profile values above {threshold_value}.
How many panels are beyond ring {threshold_value} on the highlighted spoke "{metric_label}"?
threshold_metric_count_for_panel: In panel "{panel_label}", how many metrics are above threshold {threshold_value}?
For panel "{panel_label}", count the metric vertices with values greater than {threshold_value}.
Looking only at panel "{panel_label}", how many spokes have profile values above {threshold_value}?
Within panel "{panel_label}", what is the count of metrics whose vertices are beyond ring {threshold_value}?
How many metrics in panel "{panel_label}" exceed threshold {threshold_value}?
profile_advantage_count: How many metrics have profile "{profile_a_label}" greater than profile "{profile_b_label}"?
Count the spokes where "{profile_a_label}" is farther from the center than "{profile_b_label}".
For the two-profile radar chart, on how many metrics does "{profile_a_label}" exceed "{profile_b_label}"?
What is the count of metrics where "{profile_a_label}" has the larger value than "{profile_b_label}"?
Compare the two profiles by metric: how many times is "{profile_a_label}" greater than "{profile_b_label}"?
matching_condition_panel_count: How many panels have at least {minimum_metric_count} metrics above threshold {threshold_value}?
Count the panels where {minimum_metric_count} or more metric vertices are greater than {threshold_value}.
Across panels, how many radar charts have at least {minimum_metric_count} spokes above {threshold_value}?
What is the number of panels satisfying at least {minimum_metric_count} metrics above threshold {threshold_value}?
Using the shared ring scale, how many panels meet the condition of {minimum_metric_count} metrics above {threshold_value}?

answer_and_annotation:
Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Answer field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Required annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Required answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Annotation format: {annotation_hint}.
Final answer format: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

Format for the "annotation" field: {annotation_hint}.
Format for the "answer" field: {answer_hint}.
Example JSON:
{json_example}

query:highlighted_metric_threshold_panel.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:highlighted_metric_threshold_panel.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around each radar panel whose highlighted metric is above the threshold

query:threshold_metric_count_for_panel.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:threshold_metric_count_for_panel.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points, one at each counted vertex in the queried panel

query:profile_advantage_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:profile_advantage_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to a list of segments. Each segment is two [x, y] pixel points formatted [[x0, y0], [x1, y1]], using the two named profile points for one counted metric; use [] if no metrics match

query:matching_condition_panel_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
query:matching_condition_panel_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes, one around each radar panel satisfying the condition
